authors.author: Gerald Coates
Gerald Coates
Blickt auf zum Herrn und seinem Thron

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who has held the oceans in his hands? Who has numbered every grain of sand? Kings and nations tremble at his voice All creation rises to rejoice

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Behold our God, seated on his throne Come, let us adore him Behold our king, nothing can compare Come, let us adore him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who has given counsel to the Lord? Who can question any of his words? Who can teach, the one who knows all things? Who can fathom all his wondrous deeds?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who has felt the nails upon his hands? Bearing all the guilt of sinful man God eternal, humbled to the grave Jesus, Savior, risen now to reign

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You will reign forever (let Your glory fill the Earth) You will reign forever (let Your glory fill the Earth) You will reign forever (let Your glory fill the Earth) You will reign forever (let Your glory fill the Earth)
